approaches.title: Using a Set of Char
approaches.blurb: Collect seen characters into a set of char and test subset membership.

approaches.title: Using a Bit Field
approaches.blurb: Track seen letters with a longword bit field and compare to a 26-bit mask.

approaches.title: Using an Array of Boolean
approaches.blurb: Track seen letters in a fixed Array [0..25] of Boolean indexed by character arithmetic.
